creator: mmr@rom.allnet.ne.jp
text:
When I started emacs and got into dired-mode, I couldn't edit files
nor directories while I could see the list of files and directories.

Fix: 

Replace /bin/ls with previous version.
How-To-Repeat: 
Set LANG for ja_JP.EUC and place 4.1-Release's ls in /bin/ls,
and use Emacs dired-mode.
